name: defi-receipts
description: A DeFi opportunity engine that grades itself on what actually happened. Self-tracking scanner + Postgres realization layer + dashboard + gated Telegram alerts + agent operability.

scripts.report: node -e "const r=require('./scanner/data/latest_report.json'); for(const s of (r.top_strategies||[]).slice(0,15)) console.log((s.tvlFlight!=null?'[TRAP] ':'')+s.category, s.expectedReturn, '|', s.action.slice(0,56))"
scripts.check: for f in scanner/src/*.js dashboard/*.mjs realization/*.mjs alerting/*.mjs integrations/mcp/*.mjs; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && echo ok
